active_verify.decision_reason: artifact_path must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; primitive_correctness_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; c1_baseline_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; scaling comparison vs c=1 and serial bridge baselines is incomplete; profiler trace was not captured with expected kernels present; profiler.artifact_path must be under benchmarks/results; profiler.source_artifact_path must be a non-empty string; profiler kernel names must include selected projection_dispatch candidate or variant; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.requested_mode must be batched_lm_head; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.native_row_aware_lm_head must be true; commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json

conclusion: Current no-flag c4 all-layer rowchunk2 default loaded c1, c4 serial-bridge, primitive c4 correctness, and all-layer profiler summary while preserving generated-token equality [137]*4 after the c4 hard-row demotion. Scaling references are complete (aggregate_vs_c1=1.0666, aggregate_vs_serial_bridge=1.3205), but this is required runtime evidence only: all-layer rowchunk full attention keeps native_caware_decode=false and the profiler command was captured from a no-baseline smoke rather than the exact retained-attachment command. No retained throughput/scaling claim is made.

prompt_verifier.evidence: Pass: this refreshes required c4 c1/serial/profiler runtime evidence after the c4 default was demoted back to all-layer rowchunk2, preserving c4 [137]*4 and GPU1/XTX provenance. No retained throughput/scaling claim.

blockers: native c>N decode currently supports compact physical-slot-ordered rows; full-attention batch context is native only for BF16 KV and context < 1024
full-attention decode forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path
